savings.note: only one week of pay due to the calendar, so next pay will be for two full weeks of pay

tennis.notes: Worked really well from the start and then slowed down and they played a lot better. Did not have time for the 10 point tiebreaker.
Really good serve, good volley, just inconsistent and really need to work on returns and as always backhand.

notes.title: My home equipment
notes.body:
This is all the gym materials that I have at home:
Rogue square rack mounted on wall with pull up bar and 45lbs and 35lbs bars
I have two of each of the following barbell plates (lbs): 2.5, 5, 10, 15, 25, 35, & 45
Interchangeable dumbbell set with the following interchangeable weights (lbs): four 2.5 weights, four 4.5 weighs, & four 5 weights
Bench (flat, does not raise and is low to ground)
Box for box jumps (roughly 2’’ x 3.5” x 2.5”)
Jump rope
Bands (stretching, assisted pull ups)
Fan row machine
Kettle bell weights (lbs): 9, 13, 26 35, & 53
Medicine ball weights (lbs): 10, 12, 15, & 20
Rings on straps hooked on squat rack (face pulls)
Pairs of non interchangeable dumbbells with weights (lbs): 5. 10, & 15

notes.title: CHAT SUMMARY — 2026-06-14 — Fitness + Home Gym Set Up and Adaption
notes.body:
Program

Week 1, Upper/Lower 4-day split
Baselines: Bench 140, Squat 200, Pull-ups 4-6 (goal: 10 by Jul 31)
Week 1 working weights deliberately set at ~60% — intentional, not a problem
Progression rule: +5 lbs bench/squat when top of rep range hit all sets, two sessions in a row

Today's Workout (Upper Day)

Bench Press: 85 lbs, 3x8, 90s rest
DB Row: 30 lbs, 3x10 each, 90s rest
DB Overhead Press: 20 lbs, 3x10, 90s rest (19 lbs actual due to equipment — creative loading)
Face Pulls: bodyweight (rings), 3x15, 60s rest
Barbell Curls: 35 lbs, 2x12, 60s rest — form broke down last set, weight too heavy for rep scheme

Open Issues

Calorie intake not hitting 2,400+ target — flagged as priority gap
Barbell curl form needs to be owned before adding weight — drop to 25-30
Wednesday schedule timing conflict with Magda's lesson — chronologically broken, needs fix
EC-OS needs three updates: Notes tab (localStorage), full workout history view, Wednesday schedule fix
No sessions logged in EC-OS yet — needs to happen at work today

Equipment confirmed this session

Home gym with rack, barbell, plates to 260 lbs total, interchangeable DBs (max ~30 lbs loaded), fixed DBs (5/10/15), kettlebells, rings, fan rower, box, bands, medicine balls

Context for next chat

Paste this into EC-OS Notes tab once it's built
Tell Winston to check EC-OS before any workout/program analysis
Raw GitHub blocked — provide index.html directly to make code changes

notes.title: CHAT SUMMARY — 2026-06-14 — Fitness + EC-OS Supabase Migration
notes.body:
FITNESS

Program: 4-day Upper/Lower split. Upper A/B Mon/Thu, Lower A/B Tue/Fri.
First workout completed 6/14 (Upper A). All reps and weights hit.
Working weights: Bench 85, DB Row 30, DB OHP 20, Face Pulls band, Curl 25 (dumbbell not barbell — bar is 45 lbs). Bicep curl was logged at 35, flag this next session.
Supplements: Intra House = intra-workout sip (not pre), Reversal = post-workout 2 scoops in 24-28oz water. Already has ~2.25g Kre-Alkalyn creatine. May supplement with extra 2-3g mono.
Alarm set for 6:30am. Workout before work. Breakfast after shower: eggs, sausage, fruit.
Calorie target 2,400+/day — currently not being met.

EC-OS INFRASTRUCTURE

Supabase project live: bezcgrtihvmktxjkbfrl.supabase.co
Tables created: ec_config, ec_savings, ec_gym, ec_golf, ec_tennis, ec_habits, ec_notes
index.html updated with Supabase sync hooks on all save/delete functions
GitHub Action running every 6 hours, exports all tables to public/data.json — readable at raw.githubusercontent.com/elicrist/EC-OS/main/public/data.json
Notes tab added to EC-OS — localStorage + Supabase backed
Manual Action trigger available anytime from Actions tab
Dock PWA updated and confirmed working with live data

OPEN LOOPS

Creatine top-up decision pending (bring supplement labels next chat)
Full equipment list never transferred — came from a different chat Claude can't access
Bicep curl weight discrepancy (logged 35, prescribed 25) — address next Upper A session
Lower A weights not yet tested — first Lower day is next week

NEXT ACTIONS

Monday: Lower A first session
Trigger Action manually after adding notes so data.json updates immediately
Bring supplement container labels next chat for creatine final call
